package rulecoverage

func PositiveFmtHotPath() string {
    ruleID := "fmt_hot_path"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "fmt formatting calls such as Sprintf inside loops."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
